query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS legal_document_acceptances (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id INT NOT NULL,
  document_id INT NOT NULL,
  document_version VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  ip_address VARCHAR(45),
  user_agent TEXT,
  accepted_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  FOREIGN KEY (document_id) REFERENCES legal_documents(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
)
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3MFojkLuMTYkad4.root --database VvJGXt6mJVC6petxtZ2P78 --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS legal_document_acceptances (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id INT NOT NULL,
  document_id INT NOT NULL,
  document_version VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  ip_address VARCHAR(45),
  user_agent TEXT,
  accepted_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  FOREIGN KEY (document_id) REFERENCES legal_documents(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
)
